sql.trim: t_customer.customer_name AS customer_name, t_customer.phone AS phone, t_customer.wechat AS wechat, t_customer.email AS email, t_customer.channel AS channel, t_customer.capital AS capital, t_customer.mode AS mode, t_customer.data_source AS data_source, t_customer.dev_status AS dev_status

mapper.sql: select id, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, delete_flag, customer_name, phone, wechat, email, channel, capital, mode, channel, data_source, dev_status from t_customer
mapper.insert:
insert into t_customer
create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, delete_flag, customer_name, phone, wechat, email, channel, capital, mode, data_source, dev_status,
#{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteFlag}, #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{wechat}, #{email}, #{channel}, #{capital}, #{mode}, #{dataSource}, #{devStatus},
